title: Update /up endpoint — content negotiation via Accept header
description:
The `/up` endpoint currently always returns JSON. It needs to inspect the `Accept` request header (or a `format` query param as fallback) and dispatch to the appropriate response format: `text/html`, `application/json`, or `text/markdown`.

This is the routing/dispatch layer that the format-specific sub-tasks depend on.

Parent ticket: https://linear.app/axbots/issue/TES-18/update-up-endpoint
scope: Add content-negotiation logic to the /up endpoint so it selects the correct response format based on the Accept header.
acceptance_criteria: Request with `Accept: application/json` returns JSON response
Request with `Accept: text/html` returns HTML response
Request with `Accept: text/markdown` returns Markdown response
Default (no Accept header or `*/*`) falls back to JSON for backwards compatibility
Content-Type response header matches the format served
relation_to_original: Core infrastructure change required by the parent ticket; all three format variants depend on this dispatch logic being in place.
